generated_oml:
instance CurrentSensorI_M : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentRawData
]

instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted position encoder of the first rotary joint"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorMountedAngleRawData
]

instance GearboxMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox‑mounted position encoder of the first rotary joint"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxMountedAngleRawData
]

instance MotorCurrentRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensorI_M
]

instance MotorMountedAngleRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder
]

instance GearboxMountedAngleRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxMountedEncoder
]

instance TorqueDerivedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data computed from motor current and motor angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentRawData, MotorMountedAngleRawData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance VelocityDerivedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived velocity data computed from motor angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorMountedAngleRawData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for data processing and friction model identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, LiveDataDashboardService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for multi‑physics motor and gearbox simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables MultiPhysicsSimulationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for integration with Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:enables IntegrationService
]

instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time friction identification using white‑box analytical and black‑box data‑driven models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight, MotionAccuracyAction
]

instance LiveDataDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Live data visualization in a dashboard application"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualization
]

instance MultiPhysicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Multi‑physics simulation of motor and gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance IntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of digital twin with Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides IntegrationInsight
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of friction loss trends derived from real‑time data"
]

instance MotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control parameters to improve motion accuracy based on friction insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visualization of deviation between measured and simulated torque/velocity"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from multi‑physics simulation comparing structural and dynamic models"
]

instance IntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from AAS integration for interoperability"
]

instance StructuralSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Engineering structural model of the first axis captured in SysML"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB‑Simulink model of motor dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB‑Simulink model of gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkSystemDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB‑Simulink multi‑physics motor/gearbox system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance WhiteBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box analytical friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black‑box data‑driven friction model using machine learning"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance RotaryJointComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First rotary joint (motor + dual gearbox) of MABI MAX 100 industrial serial robot"
]

instance MABIEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RotaryJointComponent
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation: live sensor data is streamed, processed, and visualized with sub‑second latency; friction model updates occur continuously as new data arrives, ensuring the digital shadow reflects the current operating state."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "AAS‑based data ingestion layer connected to robot sensors; a processing component that consumes sensor data and runs simulation models; output data traces forwarded to a dashboard; inter‑component connections defined via UML; the whole constellation functions as a passive digital shadow consuming data from the robot."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "operated – the digital shadow models the robot during operation and continuously updates friction models."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous traceability of data generation via the processing component; multi‑physics awareness and combination of white‑box and black‑box friction models; continuous identification adapting to wear, load and temperature changes; no explicit formal V&V metrics reported in the text."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming; Asset Administration Shells for semantic description; one‑way data flow from the physical robot to the digital shadow over a local network (details not specified)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML v1.7 for modeling; Asset Administration Shells conforming to Industry 4.0 standards; reference to Kritzinger et al. digital shadow reference model; ISO/IEC 2011 not specified but the modeling approach follows established digital twin reference practices."
]
